record.text:
目前開源 AI coding agent 又多了一個選擇：anomalyco/opencode。

這個專案主打開源，目標是讓 AI 能夠像人類一樣自動寫程式。他們提供了多種安裝方式，包含常見的 npm, brew，甚至還有 Windows 上的 scoop 和 choco，看起來是想讓大家都能輕鬆試用。

實測下來，對於一些重複性高或較簡單的 coding 任務，這類 agent 確實能起到一定的輔助作用。但對於複雜的邏輯判斷或架構設計，還是需要人工介入。這也是目前這類 AI 在實際應用上的主要卡點。

如果你對 AI 輔助程式開發有興趣，可以試試看。

#AICoding #OpenSou

DeepEval 是一個開源的 LLM 評估框架，用來測試 LLM 應用程式，概念上類似 Pytest。它整合了 G-Eval、任務完成度、答案相關性、幻覺等指標，透過 LLM-as-a-judge 或其他本地執行的 NLP 模型來進行評估。無論是開發 AI agent、RAG pipeline 還是 chatbot，DeepEval 都能提供協助，並且支援 LangChain 和 OpenAI 等整合。

#DeepEval #LLMEvaluation #RAG #Agent

https://github.com/confident-ai/deepeval

Google I/O 2024 上，Google 宣布搜尋引擎將進行大改版，核心會是 Gemini 3.5 Flash。搜尋框將從輸入關鍵字變成對話式介面，用戶可以直接提問。目前看來，這會讓 Google Search 更像一個 AI 助理，而非傳統的關鍵字搜尋。接下來會觀察實際的搜尋體驗和結果品質。

images.alt: The visual is a surreal, cinematic nightmare that blends intimate cabaret with Lynchian suburban horror. The setting is a dimly lit, wood-paneled basement rec room, circa 1970, with dirty orange shag carpet and wood paneling on the walls. I am sitting on the floor in the center, wearing a tattered, vintage slip dress and mismatched socks, holding a tiny ukulele. My face is pale, with heavy black rings around my eyes, staring straight at the camera with an intense, almost desperate expression. The lighting is harsh and sickly—a single bare bulb swinging overhead, casting long, jerky shadows that make the room look like it's breathing. In the background, blurry figures are standing around in a circle, just watching silently. Some are wearing distorted plastic masks. The texture is grainy, like an old VHS tape tracking badly. The vibe is claustrophobic, raw, and deeply unsettling—like a beautiful song being sung at the end of the world.

images.alt:
A towering ritual chamber stretches inward through a cramped, dimly lit corridor lined with carved wooden totems, hanging cords, animal bones, and weathered tribal relics. At the center stands a massive circular idol resembling a drum or ceremonial shield, stained with grime and smeared with dripping crimson paint that forms a primitive symbol across its surface. Mounted above the structure is a grotesque demonic face with layered flesh-like textures, deep-set eyes, curling black horns, tangled hair, and jagged tusks hanging beneath its jaw. Additional horn structures and bone ornaments protrude from the sides of the idol, creating the impression of a monstrous guardian fused into the architecture itself.
The environment is saturated with smoke and orange firelight from two braziers burning at the base of the shrine, casting flickering illumination across the damp floor and surrounding debris. Small skulls, woven baskets, drums, torn cloth, and ritual objects clutter the edges of the corridor. Tattered fabric hangs from above, partially obscuring shafts of pale daylight filtering through openings in the ceiling. The perspective draws the viewer directly toward the idol, creating a claustrophobic tunnel effect that feels ceremonial, hostile, and ancient. The scene blends dark fantasy, tribal horror, and cinematic creature design into a single oppressive environment filled with heat, soot, decay, and ritual menace.
Keywords:
dark fantasy, ritual shrine, demonic idol, tribal horror, ceremonial chamber, firelight, smoke, skulls, ancient relics, grotesque creature, occult environment, cinematic atmosphere

The environment is saturated with smoke and orange firelight from two braziers burning at the base of the shrine, casting flickering illumination across the damp floor and surrounding debris. Small skulls, woven baskets, drums, torn cloth, and ritual objects clutter the edges of the corridor. Tattered fabric hangs from above, partially obscuring shafts of pale daylight filtering through openings in the ceiling. The perspective draws the viewer directly toward the idol, creating a claustrophobic tunnel effect that feels ceremonial, hostile, and ancient. The scene blends dark fantasy, tribal horror, and cinematic creature design into a single oppressive environment filled with heat, soot, decay, and ritual menace.

A dramatic vintage-style courtroom movie poster centers on a poised red-haired woman standing confidently before a darkened courtroom engulfed in swirling smoke and embers. She wears a tailored gray blazer over a burgundy vest and cream blouse, styled in a 1940s aesthetic with softly curled shoulder-length hair and deep red lipstick. Her expression is calm, defiant, and unwavering as she stares directly ahead beneath glowing courtroom light.
Behind her, shadowy figures occupy the courtroom benches and witness stands. Two stern men in suits flank the lower left side of the composition, one wearing a fedora, while another severe-looking man sits to the right beside a weary woman with a cigarette. In the upper corners, judges and officials observe from elevated benches partially obscured by fire-like smoke and drifting ash, creating an atmosphere of political tension and institutional corruption.
The color palette blends burnt orange, sepia, charcoal black, and muted cream tones, giving the image the look of a historical prestige drama mixed with a political thriller. A judge’s gavel rests prominently in the lower left foreground while legal papers and eyeglasses sit on the desk below. Large distressed lettering across the center reads “THE DEFENSE,” with the tagline beneath stating “COURAGE HAS A VOICE.” At the top of the poster, bold text declares: “Based on a true story. She defied the system to defend the truth.” The overall composition evokes classic Oscar-season courtroom dramas with modern cinematic intensity and painterly realism.
Keywords:
courtroom, political thriller, vintage cinema, redhead, lawyer, smoke, gavel, corruption, cinematic poster, historical drama, embers, justice

江戸時代からある言葉多すぎ！

元々相撲用語で「お情けナシの真剣勝負」という意味で使われていたみたいですね。

対語は「八百長」となるのですが、こちらは明治時代にできた言葉。
八百屋の主人長兵衛が囲碁でお客の機嫌を取るためにわざと負ける、「接待囲碁」が語源のよう。

なので初期の八百長は「お情けアリのゆるゆる勝負」という微笑ましいものだったのでした。
